overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy running through a corrupted landscape covered in red blight vines, transitioning from rocky open terrain into a dense tropical jungle. The character navigates elevated ridges and discovers a fallen machine enemy before entering a lush forest path.

scene_state.functional_zone: corrupted rocky hillside with blight vines

events.description: player approaches a dead machine body with a purple loot marker
character begins climbing up a mossy rock formation

agents.ego_description: running up a corrupted slope and climbing over mossy rocks, approaching a fallen enemy

entered.detail: ground covered in red corruption vines and tendrils
fallen mechanical creature lying on the ground
glowing purple interactive marker floating above the dead body
green moss-covered rocks forming a climbable incline
tall palm tree visible in the distance against the sky
dense tree line visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a corrupted landscape covered in red blight vines, approaching a dead machine enemy marked with a purple loot indicator. She then climbs up a mossy rock formation as the camera follows from behind, revealing distant mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated ridge with panoramic mountain views

events.description: character reaches the top of the ridge revealing expansive mountain views

agents.ego_description: running along an elevated ridge path with red vines underfoot, surveying the distant landscape

entered.detail: mountain range visible in the background with misty valleys between peaks
fog-filled valley visible between the ridges
dense green forest canopy in the distance

segments.scene_description: Running along an open ridge with red blight vines covering the ground, the character moves through wide-open terrain with panoramic views of distant mountains and misty valleys. The mossy formation falls behind to the left as the path continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone between corrupted and healthy land

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the red corruption gives way to more natural rock and grass

entered.detail: natural dirt and rock trail becoming more defined and less corrupted
green grass growing between the rocks replacing red vines

segments.scene_description: The terrain transitions from heavily corrupted red vines to more natural ground with grass patches and exposed rock. The path continues forward as the density of red blight decreases significantly, preparing to enter the jungle ahead.

events.description: character enters the dense jungle canopy with palm trees and thick undergrowth

agents.ego_description: running through a narrow jungle path surrounded by dense tropical vegetation and palm trees

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding through dense tropical vegetation
tall palm trees with textured trunks lining both sides of the path
dense tropical plants and ferns covering the ground on both sides
thick tree canopy overhead filtering the sunlight into dappled patterns

segments.scene_description: Entering a dense tropical jungle, the character runs along a narrow path surrounded by lush undergrowth and palm trees. The red corruption is left behind as the environment becomes a vibrant green jungle with dappled sunlight filtering through the dense canopy overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a corrupted wasteland that gradually transforms into a vibrant tropical jungle. It begins with the character running through a landscape choked by red blight vines, passing a fallen machine enemy before climbing a mossy rock formation that reveals a panoramic view of distant mountains. As the character moves along an open ridge, the wide vistas of misty valleys persist while the mossy rocks recede into the distance. The scene then shifts as the red corruption begins to fade, giving way to patches of natural grass and exposed rock that signal the end of the blight. Finally, the path leads directly into a dense jungle, where the red vines are replaced by lush undergrowth and palm trees under a canopy of dappled sunlight.
